_note: SYNTHETIC illustrative export-layer connection inventory, no real credentials
_disclaimer: Illustrative demo data for the AngelServ / Top Spirit process-review engagement. Fictional source systems and owners. No endpoints, hosts, credentials, real company names or personal data. Export-layer-first, human-in-the-loop.

connections.name: ERP sales and AR export
connections.source_system: Demo ERP (sales ledger and accounts receivable)
connections.note: Sales invoices plus open-item AR balances. Drop-folder export, no live connector. Feeds the reconciliation assistant.

connections.name: Bank statement feed
connections.note: Statement lines exported manually. No account or bank-routing numbers retained in the demo set. Bank-to-invoice matching is suggestion-only.

connections.name: CRM customer export
connections.gdpr_classification: internal - customer contact and trading terms
connections.note: Customer names, channel, region, credit limit and payment terms. Used to enrich fuzzy name matching. Synthetic Austrian beverage accounts only.

connections.name: Document and email order intake
connections.note: Purchase-order PDFs and order emails. AI drafts the order fields; a named operator approves before any ERP write-back (NO_WRITE_BACK by default).

connections.name: Price-list export
connections.note: Product code, category, unit price (EUR per bottle), validity dates and UOM. Reference data for order-line price validation.

connections.name: Stock-availability export
connections.note: On-hand and committed stock per SKU. Planned export to flag out-of-stock lines during order review. Not yet wired into the prototype.
